mapper.insert: insert into trainsinfo (trainstitle, trainsname, trainshour, trainscontent, trainscount, isstart) values (#{trainsTitle}, #{trainsName}, #{trainsHour}, #{trainsContent}, #{trainsCount}, #{isStart})
mapper.select:
select * from trainsinfo
and isStart = 1
and trainsName like concat('%',#{name},'%')
